_readme: Add client-specific QC rules here. 'detect' is text that must appear in the survey name to match this client. Rules are evaluated against the parsed report. Tell Claude what rule you want to add and it will update this file.

rules.description: Second Recommendation not filled in but comment describes one
rules.message: The General Comment describes a second recommendation but the Second Recommendation section scored 0. The shopper needs to complete Q6 and the related sub-questions.
